data.title: Texas Instruments Tops Q1 Estimates, Strong Guidance Sparks Stock Surge
data.description: Texas Instruments Inc (NASDAQ: TXN) released its first-quarter financial results following the market close on Wednesday. The company reported revenues of $4.83 billion, surpassing analyst estimates of $4.53 billion. Earnings for the quarter were reported at $1.68 per share, also exceeding analyst projections of $1.37 per share. The earnings per share figure included a five-cent benefit not included in the company's initial guidance. Total revenue experienced a 19% year-over-year increase, propelled by growth in the industrial and data center sectors. The stock of Texas Instruments is on the rise, nearing significant levels.

data.title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES REPORTS FIRST QUARTER RESULTS, BUSINESS TRANSFORMATION INITIATIVES DELIVER MEANINGFUL MARGIN EXPANSION
data.description: In the recent quarter, the company reported a net income of $227 million, translating to an earnings per share of $0.45, which is in accordance with their projected guidance. The operating margin saw a significant increase of 8.1 points year-over-year, reaching 4.6%. Operating cash flow for the quarter was $1.4 billion. This marked a record-breaking first-quarter performance for passenger, operating, and unit revenues. The company also effectively managed its business revenue performance during this period.

data.title: NiSource to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call on May 6
data.description: NiSource Inc., based in Merrillville, Indiana, is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6, 2026. Alongside this announcement, the company will conduct a conference call specifically for investors.

data.title: Lam Research Stock Jumps On Q3 Record Revenue, Earnings
data.description: Lam Research Corp. (LRCX) released its third-quarter results with earnings surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported earnings of $1.47 per share, an 8.09% increase from the estimated $1.36. Quarterly revenue stood at $5.84 billion, exceeding the anticipated $5.78 billion and marking a significant growth from $4.72 billion in the corresponding period the previous year. LRCX stock is on the move in response to the positive results. This information can be found in detail on Benzinga.com.

data.title: RE/MAX HOLDINGS, INC. TO RELEASE FIRST QUARTER 2026 RESULTS ON MAY 7, 2026
data.description: On April 22, 2026, based in Denver, RE/MAX Holdings, Inc., listed on NYSE as RMAX, the owning entity of REMAX and Motto Mortgage, a prominent franchisor of real estate brokerage services and the sole national mortgage brokerage franchise brand in the U.S., is set to announce a new development.

data.title: Hewlett Foundation President: Philanthropy Must Bridge AI Governance Gap Between Washington and Silicon Valley
data.description: Amber D. Miller advocates for the importance of philanthropy and civil society in safeguarding crucial infrastructure and promoting widespread advantages. Discussing AI policy debates between Washington and Silicon Valley, Hewlett Foundation emphasized the need for collaboration. The statement was made in San Francisco on April 22, 2026.

data.title: State Leaders to Rally at Texas Capitol for Water Safety Day Ahead of Peak Summer Season
data.description: In Austin, Texas, the Texas Water Safety Coalition is organizing Texas Water Safety Day at the Capitol on May 1st from 8:00–10:00 a.m. on the South Steps of the Texas Capitol as the state gears up for peak water recreation season. Senator Judith Zaffirini emphasized the importance, stating that drowning incidents can occur rapidly and unexpectedly. In 2023, House Bill 59, also called Cati’s Law, was introduced to enhance water safety measures for Texas children. Zaffirini stressed the necessity of ongoing efforts to promote awareness and reinforce safety protocols.

data.title: Highwoods Announces $250M Common Stock Repurchase Program
data.description: In Raleigh, North Carolina on April 22, 2026, Highwoods Properties, Inc. disclosed that its Board of Directors sanctioned the repurchase of up to $250 million worth of common stock under a fresh stock repurchase initiative. The Company plans to finance these repurchases in a leverage-neutral manner by utilizing the net profits from divesting non-core assets.

data.title: Stocks rise amid uncertainty over cease-fire extension with Iran; oil prices stabilize as investors react to President Trump's decision.
data.description: The oil market experienced stabilization following President Trump’s announcement to prolong the cease-fire with Iran. Investors are working to understand the decision, which has had an impact on oil prices. The extension of the cease-fire contributed to a steadying effect amidst the uncertainty, with the market closely monitoring developments. This move comes as a relief, with oil prices showing signs of stability. The decision has resonated with investors, prompting a shift in the oil market. The update from President Trump has influenced market dynamics, with stakeholders actively responding to the news. The extension has caused fluctuations in oil prices, with the market reacting to the decision. Overall, the decision to prolong the cease-fire has resulted in oil prices stabilizing, with the industry closely monitoring the situation for further developments.

data.title: In HelloNation, Pest Control Expert Brittany Thacker Explains Crawl Space Inspection for Pest Prevention
data.description: A recent article discusses the importance of moisture control and frequent inspections in preventing pest infestations within crawl spaces. According to the piece published on April 22, 2026 in JASPER, Ga., neglecting moisture control is highlighted as a leading cause of pest issues in homes. The article, available on HelloNation, emphasizes the significance of these practices in maintaining a pest-free environment.

data.title: First American Financial Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: A financial services company, First American Financial Corporation (NYSE: FAF), based in Santa Ana, California, released its first-quarter results for the period ending March 31, 2026. The extensive highlights of this quarter include earnings per diluted share amounting to $1.21 or $1.33 per share on an adjusted basis. Additionally, the company reported net investment losses of $9 million, equivalent to 7 cents per diluted share. First American Financial Corporation is recognized for offering title, settlement, and risk solutions for real estate transactions, positioning itself as a leader in the digital evolution of its sector.

data.title: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. Reports First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. ("KREF") (NYSE: KREF) has released its first quarter 2026 results, now available on the Investor Relations section of KREF’s website. To discuss these financial results, a conference call is scheduled for Thursday, April 23, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. ET. For access, individuals can dial (844) 784-1730 (U.S. callers) or +1 (412) 380-7410 (non-U.S. callers).

data.title: Ellington Financial Announces Release Date of First Quarter 2026 Earnings, Conference Call, and Investor Presentation
data.description: In Old Greenwich, Connecticut, Ellington Financial Inc. (NYSE: EFC) revealed it will report financial results for the quarter ending March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Tuesday, May 5, 2026. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time on Wednesday, May 6, 2026. To join the call via telephone, dial (800) 343-4136 at least 10 minutes before the start time and mention the conference code.

data.title: United Rentals Announces Strong First Quarter Results and Raises Full-Year 2026 Guidance
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, United Rentals, Inc. (NYSE: URI) revealed their financial performance for the initial quarter of 2026 with remarkable achievements. Their total revenue hit a record high of $3.985 billion, with rental revenue standing at $3.419 billion. Net income amounted to $531 million, showcasing a 20 basis point increase from the previous year, and achieving a margin of 13.3%. Earnings per share ("EPS") and adjusted EBITDA also reached all-time highs. As a result of these strong numbers, the company has revised its full-year guidance for 2026 upwards.

data.title: Eagle Materials Schedules Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call With Senior Management
data.description: Dallas-based Eagle Materials Inc. will be reporting their financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year 2026 which ended on March 31, 2026. The report is scheduled to be released on Tuesday, May 19, 2026, before the opening of the NYSE. An investor conference call is set for the same day at 8:30 am Eastern Time (7:30 am Central Time). To tune in to the call, individuals can access a webcast and slide presentation at ir.eaglematerials.com/webcasts-presentations. The slides will also be available for download. Eagle Materials Inc. is listed on the NYSE under ticker symbol EXP.

data.title: Hexcel Declares Quarterly Dividend
data.description: Hexcel Corporation (NYSE: HXL) declared a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.18 per share on the common stock, payable to stockholders of record as of May 4, 2026, with a payment date of May 11, 2026. Hexcel is a global leader in advanced lightweight composites technology, offering innovative, high-performance material solutions.

data.title: Supernus Pharmaceuticals to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results and Host Conference Call on May 5, 2026
data.description: In Rockville, Maryland, on April 22, 2026, Supernus Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: SUPN), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in CNS disease treatments, revealed plans to disclose its first quarter 2026 financial and business outcomes on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, after the market closes.
